description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Copilot Setup Steps that runs on ubuntu-latest with a read-only repository token. The workflow should trigger on workflow dispatch, push to .github/workflows/copilot-setup-steps.yml, and pull requests to that file. It sets up Python 3.10, installs uv, creates and activates a virtual environment, installs base dependencies like tensorflow-cpu and PyTorch, builds a Python package, installs pre-commit tools and hooks, and verifies the installation.
